headline: How The Best Buy (BBY) Narrative Is Shifting On Cautious Targets And Stable Fair Value
summary: Best Buy’s fair value anchor holds at US$72.50, signaling no shift in the core price target used in this latest update. That stability comes as analysts remain split but generally cautious, with some raising targets on stronger Q4 execution while others trim expectations on softer traffic and competitive pressure in consumer electronics. As you read on, you will see how this steady US$72.50 view fits into the back and forth in analyst opinions and what to watch as the story continues to...

headline: A Florida Salesperson Thought He Was Helping People Go Solar. Now He Complains To Dave Ramsey He's Really Selling Loans, Not Solar Panels
summary: A Florida man who took a job selling solar panels says he quickly realized he wasn’t really selling clean energy systems. Instead, he told personal finance personality Dave Ramsey that the real focus seemed to be financing and loans. During...
